title: Workstation Use — After-Hours Login from Non-Clinical IP Space

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).
Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk Add-on for Citrix (2757), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (1621)
spl:
index=citrix sourcetype="citrix:session" earliest=-7d
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| where (hour<6 OR hour>22)
| iplocation client_ip
| lookup clinical_role_users.csv UserName OUTPUT role
| where role IN ("RN_INPATIENT","MD_INPATIENT") AND NOT match(Org,"*Health System*")
| stats count by UserName, client_ip, Country, City, Org
| sort - count
value: Flags Citrix/VDI launches for inpatient CPOE roles originating from residential ISP ASNs outside hospital guest WiFi, supporting workstation use policies in shared clinical environments.
implementation: (1) Replace `Org` heuristic with ASN lookup table; (2) allow VPN concentrator ranges; (3) route to privacy for workforce policy review.
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic by All_Traffic.src | sort - count
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
